entries.intro: Participated in a dedicated product group focused on rapid prototyping and developing new ideas from concept to working MVP. As part of the team, delivered two diverse projects in the crypto and fintech space.

subSections.heading: Project 1: Crypto analytics platform with AI chat
subSections.description: A platform for traders and investors that aggregates exchange data, news feeds, and blockchain information to calculate personalized statistics and provide recommendations.
bullets: Developed a high-load Node.js backend (microservice architecture) with inter-service communication via Apache Kafka
Integrated exchange APIs: implemented real-time data collection via REST and WebSocket (connecting to major exchanges), stream aggregation and normalization
Connected external data sources: parsing and processing data from CoinMarketCap, Messari, DeFiLlama, CoinGecko to enrich analytics and news feeds
Worked with smart contracts: interacting with Ethereum-compatible networks via JSON-RPC providers, interacting with WebSocket RPC providers, working with Solidity contracts
Developed an AI module: built a chat using AI SDK (integrating language models to answer user queries based on their portfolio and market data)
Database work: schema design and query optimization in PostgreSQL (transactional data) and ClickHouse (analytics, time series, large volumes of historical data).

subSections.heading: Project 2: Prediction market (Polymarket-like) for influencers
subSections.description: A platform enabling influencers to create polls (prediction markets) and followers to participate by placing bets. Implemented as a web app, mobile app (React Native), and Telegram Mini App
bullets: Architected the system from scratch: stack selection, microservice decomposition, ensuring synchronization across different clients
Developed the backend (Node.js) and smart contracts for prediction market logic (event creation, bet processing, payout calculations). Blockchain interaction via JSON-RPC, contract event handling
Created a unified API for three clients: web (React), mobile (React Native), and Telegram Mini App. Ensured consistent business logic and security
Wallet integration: implemented mechanisms for connecting crypto wallets (MetaMask, WalletConnect, Unisat, Phantom) for in-platform transactions
Voting data processing: PostgreSQL for user data, results, and history; ClickHouse for activity analytics and influencer ranking calculations
DevOps and CI/CD: set up pipelines for automated testing and deployment, containerization (Docker), orchestration (Kubernetes).

subSections.heading: Shared R&D group achievements:
bullets: Participated in the full product lifecycle — from brainstorming and design decisions to shipping MVPs to production
Refactored and optimized existing modules, ensuring scalability and maintainability
Actively collaborated with ML, mobile development, and design teams to align requirements and timelines
Contributed to code reviews, development standards adoption, and rapid prototyping of new features.

entries.stack: Node.js, Nest.js, Javascript, TypeScript, Kafka, PostgreSQL, Prisma, ClickHouse, Redis, REST, WebSocket, JSON-RPC, Ethers.js, solana/web3, web3, Docker, Kubernetes, Next.js, Zustand, React Native, Expo, AI SDK (OpenAI, etc.), Git, CI/CD, Claude Code, Cursor

bullets: Architected and developed a high-load B2B/B2C platform for pharmaceutical manufacturers and consumers
Full project ownership: from design decisions and task decomposition to sprint planning and quality control of delivered features
Database optimization: schema design, complex queries and pharmaceutical reference catalogs, ensuring high response speed under peak loads
Codebase refactoring, improved readability and maintainability, extensive test coverage for critical modules
CI/CD setup and maintenance for automated testing and platform deployment
Contributing to engineering culture: conducting interviews, onboarding and mentoring new team members, immersing them in pharma domain specifics.

entries.stack: Javascript, Typescript, React, Redux-toolkit, Scss, Vite, Postgres, Clickhouse, Prisma, Git, Docker, Kubernetes, Node.js, Nest.js, Go, Kafka, Socket.io, Redis, Jest, Supertest, React testing library, Yandex Tracker, Cursor

bullets: Development and maintenance of a high-load B2B platform: ensuring uninterrupted operation of a business-critical internal tool for company employees
Fault-tolerant architecture design: building a scalable solution from scratch, including both client and server sides optimized for heavy loads
Database performance optimization: deep refactoring of queries and schema to handle large data volumes, accelerating data retrieval and reducing server load
Code quality improvement: modernizing legacy codebase, enhancing readability and maintainability, introducing unit and integration tests for critical modules
CI/CD automation: setting up and maintaining continuous integration and delivery pipelines, automating build and deployment processes to speed up releases.

entries.stack: Javascript, Typescript, Postgres, Prisma, TimescaleDB, Git, Docker, Kubernetes, Node.js, Nest.js, Kafka, Socket.io, Redis, Jest, Supertest
